name: Debasish Lenka
title: Systems & Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
summary: Infrastructure engineer with hands-on experience designing, running, and hardening Windows Server, Active Directory, Linux, Azure, and VMware environments. Comfortable owning systems end-to-end — from architecture decisions down to the 2am pager alert.

bullets: Managed multi-domain Active Directory forest supporting N users across N sites, including GPO design and security hardening
Administered VMware vSphere clusters (N hosts, N VMs) with a focus on capacity planning and disaster recovery
Led migration of on-prem workloads to Azure, reducing infrastructure costs by N% while improving availability
Automated routine operations (patching, backups, monitoring) using PowerShell and Bash, cutting manual effort by N hours/month
Administered Windows Server environment including DNS, DHCP, and file/print services
Maintained Linux servers (RHEL/Ubuntu) supporting internal applications
Provided tier 2/3 support for infrastructure incidents
